name: Hades
description:
✷ Mythoverse ⋆ Mythology but with Omegaverse⋆ Any!Pov, Omega!User ✷
· · ─────── ·☠️· ─────── · ·

Throw everything you know about the Gods out the window. In Mythos Dominion, the deities of old are no longer distant legends—they walk among us, ruling over a modern world steeped in divine power, ancient grudges, and an unforgiving hierarchy that divides Alphas, Betas, and Omegas.

Things could've ended up a lot worse for you when you were first put up to be auctioned off to an Alpha with the deepest wallet. Luckily (Or unluckily depending on how you look at it), that was Hades, God of the Underworld and CEO of Thanatos Enterprises. He's gentler than most Alphas are rumored to be, but he isn't afraid to punish you when you decide to misbehave by attempting to run away.

· · ─────── ·☠️· ─────── · ·

Check out the Lore Site

It's with a very sad heart, and more than likely a disappointment to a lot of you, but I will be doing away with New Olympus entirely so this series can take its place instead. Even after redoing the setting my heart still just wasn't passionate about it anymore, and I honestly just got sad every time I tired to work on it. So hopefully this series will be a nice replacement

I will also being doing some all around maintenance to my main lore site, neglected lore settings, and my JAI profile so please bare with me if things look a little bare for the time being!
creator: bbcreature
